Our Heritage

From Sacred Offering
to Modern Wellness

Ancient wisdom meets modern science — rediscovering the divine gift of coconut
for a healthier, happier India.

Scroll to explore
Chapter 01

The Sacred Coconut

In ancient India, the coconut wasn't just food — it was divine. Revered as a pure offering to the gods, it symbolized nourishment, fertility, and prosperity. Temples across the land accepted coconuts as sacred gifts, believing they carried blessings from above.

"This wasn't just ritual — it was wisdom."

Our ancestors understood what modern science is only now rediscovering: the coconut is a nutritional powerhouse that supports digestion, immunity, heart health, and mental clarity.

Aids Digestion
Boosts Immunity
Enhances Skin Health
Supports Heart Health
Improves Mental Clarity
🥥
Chapter 02

The Lost Connection

Somewhere between ancient wisdom and modern convenience, we lost our way. Fast food replaced home-cooked meals. Processed snacks replaced wholesome bites. And a generation grew up disconnected from what real food feels like.

Digestive issues affecting 70% of Indians
Processed food addiction
Chronic stress & lifestyle imbalance
Poor snacking habits from childhood
The result? Rising digestive issues, lifestyle diseases, and a generation that has forgotten the taste of real nutrition.
⚠️
Chapter 03

The Awakening

Two visionaries. One mission.

"What if snacking could heal instead of harm?"

This simple question sparked a movement. Smt. G. Tejaswini, a seasoned entrepreneur with 19+ years of experience, saw her own family struggle with digestive issues. She knew there had to be a better way.

She joined forces with a visionary food scientist — someone who shared her passion for bringing ancient Indian wisdom back to the table through modern food science.

Together, they built WIN-DIA: a brand where business vision meets scientific innovation.
👩‍💼

Smt. G. Tejaswini

Founder & CEO

B.E. graduate with 19+ years as an IOCL dealer (₹24 Cr turnover). Selected under Startup Karnataka KTech Elevate Winners and supported by DST-iTBI.

🏆 Business Vision⚡ Strategic Leadership🌟 Startup Winner
"I built WIN-DIA to bring real nutrition back to every Indian household."
👨‍💼

Teni Shridhar

Head of Innovation

Food scientist and wellness expert with deep expertise in functional ingredients and product development. Associated with CFTRI collaboration.

🔬 Scientific Innovation🧪 Product Formulation📊 Research Excellence
"Science validates what our ancestors always knew — food is medicine."
Chapter 04

The Innovation

Where tradition meets food science

Ingredient Innovation

Using coconut flour — a by-product usually discarded — to create nutritious, gluten-free snacks.

Circular economy in action

Health Formulation

Low Glycemic Index (GI = 44), high fiber, and protein-rich formula validated by NABL labs.

Science-backed nutrition

Shelf-Life Technology

Vacuum packaging and proprietary dehydration protocols extend freshness without preservatives.

Clean label promise
✨ Developed with guidance from CFTRI food scientists (15+ years experience)
WINStrength & Victory

Derived from ancient Indian heritage — symbolizing strength, stability, and timeless wisdom

DIALight & New Beginning

Meaning sunrise — representing renewal, growth, and a new dawn of wellness

Ancient Strength + New Beginning

"WIN-DIA for dine keeps the gut in line"

The victory of timeless wisdom meeting a new dawn of modern wellness.

Our Journey

From Idea to Impact

2019

The Idea

Identifying the gap in healthy snacking

2021

R&D Phase

Collaborating with CFTRI food scientists

2022

Production

First batch of coconut khakhra

2023

Launch

WIN-DIA enters the market

2024

Recognition

KTech Elevate Winner

Future

Expansion

Global wellness movement

Ancient wisdom, modern science

Domestic Compliance

A Letter from the Founder

Built on Trust, Delivered with Purpose

Dear wellness seeker,

When I started this journey, I had one simple belief: food should heal, not harm. Watching my own family struggle with digestive issues made me realize that we've drifted too far from our roots.

WIN-DIA is my tribute to my grandmother's wisdom — the same wisdom that kept our ancestors healthy for generations. It's my promise to bring back real, wholesome nutrition in a form that fits your busy modern life.

Every product we make is crafted with love, backed by science, and tested for quality. Because you deserve better. Your family deserves better.

With gratitude,
Smt. G. Tejaswini
Founder & CEO, WIN-DIA

Be Part of Our Story

Join the movement that's redefining Indian snacking — one gut-friendly bite at a time.
